title: aify-project-graph functionality overlay
description: Hand- or agent-authored feature map for a repo. Lives at `.aify-graph/functionality.json`. Permissively loaded — missing optional fields normalize to sensible defaults at read time; see docs/schema-versions.md for the compatibility posture.

version.description: Schema version of THIS overlay file (not the graph DB). Currently '0.2'. Missing = assumed '0.1'. Loader never fails on unknown version strings.

features.description: List of features. Order is preserved for deterministic brief output.

id.description: Stable machine identifier. Kebab-case, used for cross-references in depends_on / related_to / tasks.json.

label.description: Human-readable name. Falls back to id if absent.

description.description: Short one-paragraph explanation. Shown in brief.md + brief.plan.md.

anchors.description: Where this feature lives in the code+docs. Used for anchor validation and file→feature attribution.

symbols.description: Function/class/method names. Validated against graph nodes; missing ones surface via loud anchor validation.

files.description: Repo-relative file paths. Supports `path/*` globs for directory anchors.

routes.description: Framework routes (e.g. Laravel/Express/FastAPI). Matched against Route nodes.

depends_on.description: Feature IDs this feature hard-depends on (A breaks if B breaks). User-curated; validated for existence.

related_to.description: Feature IDs with weaker coupling. A touches B's concepts but isn't strictly dependent.

source.description: Provenance. `llm` entries auto-upgrade to `user` on human edit — protects curated state from future LLM proposals.

tags.description: Free-form labels. Used by /graph-walk-bugs for filtering.

contracts.description: Optional cross-feature contracts this feature publishes or consumes. Free-form doc/symbol refs.
